en: Do you know where Harvey is? Do you know who he is? Hands up, pretty boy.
ko: 하비가 어디 있는지 아세요? 그가 누구인지 아세요? 손 들어, 잘생긴 남자.

en: Do you know where I can find Harvey?
ko: 하비를 어디서 찾을 수 있는지 아세요?

en: I need to talk to him about something. Just something little, huh? No.
ko: 그와 이야기할 게 있어요. 그냥 작은 일인데, 응? 아니.

en: What's going on out there? Wayne!
Thank God you've got a panic room. I can't wait.
ko: 당신이 패닉룸을 갖고 있다니 다행이에요. 기다릴 수 없어.

en: Oh, you've got to be kidding me.
You know, I'll settle for his loved ones.
We're not intimidated by thugs. You know...
You remind me of my father.
I hated my father. Okay, stop.
